data.title: Gate Meme Go launches a limited-time free transaction fee event
data.description: According to official news, Meme Go, Gate Web3's full-chain Meme coin trading and monitoring platform, is becoming a vital tool for Web3 users to analyze on-chain assets and make trading decisions thanks to its professional features. Meme Go's limited-time, site-wide transaction fee-free promotion is currently underway, allowing users to experience full-chain trading at zero cost and make efficient decisions more quickly and reliably. Meme Go also supports millisecond-level real-time monitoring of token launch platforms across the entire chain, helping users quickly lock in promising tokens and seize early dividends. Its innovative features are leading on-chain trading to new heights, significantly improving the speed and accuracy of on-chain investment decisions. Furthermore, Meme Go's professional trading dashboard integrates multiple core features, including customizable candlestick charts and a deeply modular design, offering users a brand new trading experience. The former is deeply customized for on-chain trading characteristics, supporting multi-dimensional data display and real-time price linkage, helping users quickly understand market trends. The latter supports flexible drag-and-drop layout of monitoring and order modules, enabling seamless integration of market monitoring and order placement. With its intelligent interface and efficient interactive experience, Meme Go is continuously improving users' analysis depth and execution efficiency in on-chain transactions, further promoting the visualization and professionalization of Web3 transaction data.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 3,900 USDT with a 1.85% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 24, 2025, 04:21 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 3,900 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 3,902.5 USDT, with a narrowed 1.85% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 111,000 USDT with a 2.26% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 24, 2025, 04:27 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 111,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 111,009.101563 USDT, with a narrowed 2.26% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: BlackRock Digital Liquidity Fund BUIDL Adds $500 Million in Tokenized Assets to Polygon
data.description: Polygonscan shows that BlackRock Digital Liquidity Fund BUIDL has deployed an additional $500 million in tokenized assets to Polygon.

data.title: Stablecoin Blockchain Deposit Activity Sees Limited Participation
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a recent monitoring of the stablecoin blockchain deposit activity revealed that only 274 addresses successfully participated in the $825 million allocation. A significant portion of this, amounting to $500 million or 60.6%, was controlled by a single whale or institution using nine addresses.

data.title: Fidelity Adds Solana (SOL) to Its Platform, Bridging Wall Street and Web3
data.description:
Fidelity has added Solana trading to its retail, IRA, and institutional platforms, marking another step toward bridging traditional finance and blockchain.

The post Fidelity Adds Solana (SOL) to Its Platform, Bridging Wall Street and Web3 first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/10/24/fidelity-adds-solana-to-platform/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=fidelity-adds-solana-to-platform

data.title: CZ to Attend Second National Blockchain and Cryptocurrency Commission Meeting with Kyrgyz President
data.description: CZ announced on the X platform that he will attend the second in-person meeting of the National Blockchain and Cryptocurrency Committee with Kyrgyz President Sadyr Japarov. Since the first visit in May, much progress has been made.

data.title: The "100% Win Rate Whale" has increased its ETH holdings to $74.33 million, becoming the top ETH long position on Hyperliquid.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the "100% Win Rate Whale" currently holds 19,110.95 ETH, valued at $74.33 million, with an opening price of $3866.20 and a floating profit of $356,000. Currently, nearly $57 million worth of ETH remains in TWAP, and once all trades are completed, the total holdings will exceed $100 million.

data.title: Bets on Sam Bankman-Fried's pardon surges to 12% on Polymarket
data.description:
Former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried's odds on Polymarket of being pardoned by US President Trump have more than doubled to around 12% after Changpeng Zhao was pardoned.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sbf-pardon-odds-rise-12-percent-polymarket?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Pudgy Penguins kicks off three-city tour in China, covering Shanghai, Hangzhou and Shenzhen from October 25-29
data.description: Pudgy Penguins has announced the launch of the "Pengu Asia Tour China Edition," a series of offline meetups taking place in Shanghai, Hangzhou, and Shenzhen from October 25th to 29th. Hosted by Igloo APAC, the events are open to all community members and token holders, and participants will receive exclusive clip-on toys and merchandise.

data.title: Binance will adjust the minimum price fluctuation unit of multiple U-margin contracts
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance will adjust the minimum price fluctuation unit (TickSize) for several U-margined perpetual contracts at 3:00 PM (Beijing Time) on October 27, 2025. The affected contracts include EVAAUSDT, XPINUSDT, and TACUSDT. The adjustment will not affect existing orders. (This newsletter was generated by AI.)

data.title: Medical Technology Company ENDRA Adds HYPE Token to New Crypto Asset Pool
data.description: Medical technology company ENDRA has completed a private equity round to fund its expansion into digital assets, with a portion of the funds immediately allocated to the HYPE token, which will form a core component of its active asset management portfolio. The Ann Arbor-based medical technology company announced on October 23rd that it had completed a $4.9 million private equity (PIPE) round, primarily from institutional and crypto investors. The company also disclosed that it had allocated approximately $3 million of the raised funds to acquire 78,863 Hyperliquid platform tokens (HYPE tokens). ENDRA Life Sciences stated that this acquisition represents the first implementation of its newly formulated Digital Asset Pool (DAT) strategy. (Crypto.news)

data.title: The "100% Winning Whale" has surpassed $60 million in ETH holdings since October 11th, becoming the top two ETH bulls on Hyperliquid.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the ETH holdings of the "October 11th 100% Win Rate Whale" have exceeded $60 million. Their latest holdings are 16,093.71 (US$62.4 million), with an opening price of 3 USDT,862.37, resulting in a floating profit of $240,000. This position has now become the second-largest long position on Hyperliquid ETH, only $9 million behind the top position. Earlier news reported that the "October 11th 100% Win Rate Whale" (0xc2a...E5f2) has once again closed its positions at a profit, achieving a 12-game winning streak since October 14th, with a cumulative profit of $12.634 million.

data.title: Web3 native AI protocol LazAI releases testnet data for two months, with cumulative active users exceeding 33,000 and on-chain interactions exceeding 1.66 million
data.description: Data from Blockscout and Google Analytics show that the LazAI testnet, a Web3-native AI infrastructure protocol, has seen continued user growth in the two months since its launch, reaching 33,000 active users. Lazbubu, its premier companion AI agent that incorporates data-anchored tokens (DAT) gameplay, has also been highly active, generating 8.419 million messages and over 1.669 million on-chain interactions, with over 90,000 on-chain interactions in the past 24 hours. Furthermore, users have accumulated 14,000 Lazbubu DAT assets through minting.

data.title: A whale withdrew $2 million in USDC and bought 518 million PUMPs
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale withdrew $2 million USDC from Kraken and bought 518 million PUMPs at a price of $0.0039.

data.title: Trump: All trade talks with Canada are now terminated
data.description: US President Trump tweeted, "The Ronald Reagan Foundation has just announced that Canada has run a false advertisement falsely portraying Ronald Reagan's negative comments about tariffs. The ad is valued at $75,000. Their sole purpose is to interfere with the decisions of the US Supreme Court and other courts. Tariffs are crucial to the national security and economy of the United States. In light of Canada's egregious misconduct, we hereby announce the termination of all trade negotiations with Canada." (Jinshi)

data.title: The Ethereum OG address holding 736,000 ETH deposited 500 million USDT in advance before the stable announcement
data.description: According to Lookonchain, an Ethereum OG holding 736,000 ETH (worth $2.89 billion) deposited 500 million USDT into Stablecoin's treasury before the announcement of the pre-deposit program. The OG borrowed this USDT by pledging 300,000 ETH to Aave. Previously, the stablecoin Layer 1 project Stablecoin sold out its $825 million first-phase pre-deposit program within seconds after announcing it, sparking community concerns about insider trading. Verification revealed the official announcement was released at 9:10 AM Beijing time, while on-chain data indicates the first deposit was made at 8:48 AM, roughly suggesting that over 70% of the deposits were made before the announcement.

data.title: Galaxy CEO: The dispute between several crypto industry leaders and US Democratic lawmakers is false information
data.description: Regarding market rumors that US Democratic Congressman Gallego engaged in an argument during a meeting with several crypto industry leaders, claiming that "the crypto industry has become a pawn of the Republican Party," Galaxy CEO Mike Novogratz clarified the rumors in a post on the X platform. He stated that he was present at the meeting and that the bipartisan talks were very constructive. While there were indeed some differences of opinion, overall, both sides appeared to have a strong interest in legislation and that the relevant bill would pass. Earlier, Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong stated that the market structure bill has been finalized 90%, with all parties working to finalize the final 10%, and predicted that passage is possible before the end of the year.

data.title: BlackRock's Tokenized Fund Makes Significant Deposit on Polygon Network
data.description: According to PANews, on-chain data reveals that BlackRock's tokenized fund, BUIDL, has executed a substantial deposit of approximately $500 million on the Polygon network. The CEO of Polygon has confirmed that this transaction is indeed part of BlackRock's BUIDL deployment.
